name: @jaggerxtrm/pi-extensions
description: Unified Pi extension entrypoint for xtrm-managed extensions
author: xtrm

scripts.verify:runtime: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const required=['src/index.ts','src/registry.ts','extensions','themes'];const missing=required.filter((entry)=>!fs.existsSync(entry));if(missing.length){console.error('Missing publish runtime assets: '+missing.join(', '));process.exit(1);}console.log('Runtime assets present for npm publish.');"
